prompt: create icon for an app call called the time-saver clock: clock face where the hour hand is a rocket, limited to steel-gray and lemon-yellow, ultrathin outline.
prompt_refined: Generate an app icon featuring a minimalist clock face. The hour hand is uniquely designed as a rocket, while the minute hand appears as a standard thin line. The entire icon must be rendered with ultrathin outlines and strictly adhere to a color palette of steel-gray and lemon-yellow.
objects: Hour hand designed as a rocket
Minute hand as a standard thin line
